rationale: Regression in low-level IO not throwing EndOfStreamException; implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
MapReduce cross-DB auth failure; auth spec does not define cross-DB connection re-authentication for MapReduce output.
VB.NET LINQ 'Is Nothing' expression not supported; language binding issue, not a spec area.
Internal architectural refactor to decouple core from public API; no spec behavior involved.
DateTime serialized to wrong UTC hour when two dates in same object; BSON spec requires correct UTC datetime encoding.
IList<T>.Contains unsupported in LINQ expression; C#-specific LINQ provider limitation, not a spec area.
InsertBatch with large data throws misleading duplicate key exception; transport/batching bug, no specific spec rule violated.
InsertBatch with ContinueOnError=false must call GLE after sub-batches even with Unacknowledged WriteConcern to stop on first error.
Remove fragile EnsureIndex caching and deprecate CreateIndex; internal improvement, no spec rule.
Driver still coerces ReadPreference to Primary when connected directly to secondary; spec was amended to only coerce in replica set topology.
GridFS reads inconsistently distributed across secondaries; improvement, no specific spec rule about pinning secondary in GridFS.
Regression: Insert fails to assign ObjectId to interface members; internal serialization regression, not a spec rule.
ArgumentOutOfRangeException in EnsureIndex from non-main thread; threading bug in LINQ serialization info finder, not spec.
Legacy convention classes deprecated but still cause silent failures; API compatibility issue, not a spec area.
MongoServer.Primary not thread-safe during failover; concurrency implementation bug, no specific spec rule about thread safety.
Intermittent connection failure to EC2 server; connectivity/environment issue, not a spec conformance problem.
Feature request to support LINQ lambdas in Remove/Update; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec area.
Save with custom ID generator calls Insert instead of Upsert; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule defines Save behavior.
filemd5 fails without required index on replica set; GridFS index management issue, not a specific GridFS spec nonconformance.
SDAM state not reset after primary disconnect causing IsPrimary errors; implementation bug, no specific SDAM spec rule about state reset on exception.
BsonClassMap freeze doesn't freeze member maps; internal serialization API consistency fix, not a spec rule.
SetDefaultValue with mutable class shares default instance across deserialized objects; internal C# serialization API bug, not spec.
Feature request to expose server current time; convenience API, not a spec area.
Feature request to suppress BSON discriminator for certain classes; serialization configuration, not a spec conformance issue.
Performance improvement: cache serializer lookup for homogeneous value type arrays; no behavior change, pure optimization.
Unity engine .NET runtime doesn't support ReaderWriterLockSlim recursion policy; platform compatibility issue, not spec.
GSSAPI fails on Windows XP 32-bit due to non-standard 4-octet negotiation response; platform-specific workaround, not a spec violation.
BsonRepresentation attribute not applied in Builders when serializing to arrays; C#-specific serialization options propagation bug, no BSON spec rule.
CreateGssapiCredential with username-only throws ArgumentNullException; should use ExternalEvidence per GSSAPI auth spec.
Strengthen null-byte checks in CString handling; internal validation hardening, related DRIVERS-101 but not a spec nonconformance.
Documentation missing minimum .NET version requirement; docs issue only.
Feature request for prepackaged convention to serialize enums as strings; API ergonomics, not a spec area.
Unit test fails on non-English locale due to decimal separator; test infrastructure locale bug, not driver behavior.
Abstract Id members in base class mapped incorrectly; C# serialization convention bug, not a MongoDB spec rule.
User reports insert returns DocumentsAffected==0; appears to be a support question / usage error, resolved as Done.
IIdGenerator.GenerateId container parameter type changed from MongoCollection to internal InsertOperation; API regression, not spec.
LINQ query fails when boolean method result compared to literal true; C#-specific LINQ translation bug, not spec.
Feature request to support fieldname indexers in LINQ queries over BsonDocument; API ergonomics, not a spec area.
GeoJson serializer rejects Int32/Int64 coordinates; tolerance improvement, no BSON spec rule requires coercion here.
GeoJson insert via driver fails with malformed geometry error that direct insert passes; appears to be user issue, closed as Done.
Version string '2.5.2' inadvertently normalized to '2.5.2.0'; minor internal parsing improvement, no spec rule.
Race condition: KillCursor acquires connection being closed from exception; concurrency implementation bug, no specific spec rule.
Save with polymorphic _id generates wrong upsert query missing _t field; internal serialization/query builder bug, no spec rule.
PushEachWrapped/PushAllWrapped double-wraps values in nested array; C# update builder bug, no specific CRUD spec rule about $push/$each encoding.
Driver not utilizing setVersion from isMaster response; SDAM spec requires using setVersion to ignore stale/duplicate topology changes.
Performance regression: v1.8.2 queries slower than v1.5.0; performance issue, no spec rule about query latency.
ObjectId IConvertible.ToType throws on conversion to object type; C# API type conversion bug, not a spec area.
SetAutoIndexId(false) removes option instead of setting it to false; API/builder bug, no cross-language spec rule.
Query.Not uses $ne instead of $not for $where expressions; C# query builder bug generating wrong MongoDB syntax, no cross-driver spec rule.
Feature request for BsonDocument.Pretty() debug method; convenience API, not a spec area.
